package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringFormatInStructuredLogger() string {
    ruleID := "string_format_in_structured_logger"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`logger.Info(fmt.Sprintf(\"user %s logged in\", user))` instead of structured fields"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
